methodsAttempted.query: site:ruhr-uni-bochum.de Ruhr-Universitat Bochum generative KI ChatGPT Studium Lehre Prufung Richtlinie
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the central GPT@RUB service page, ZfW AI in studies and teaching guidance, department-level PDFs, KI:edu.nrw project/news pages, and repository-hosted legal reports.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ruhr-uni-bochum.de GPT@RUB KI Richtlinien Nutzung Studium Lehre Datenschutz
methodsAttempted.notes: Search identified the official IT.SERVICES GPT@RUB support page, GPT@RUB usage instructions PDF linked from that page, and department-specific guidance documents.
The official GPT@RUB page links to ZfW guidance, registration/login, privacy text, and the usage instructions PDF.

PDF discovery found English Seminar and Geography Institute guidance that was usable only for unit-scoped assessment and academic integrity claims; a Philology faculty guide was rejected because the extracted text was too garbled for reliable evidence.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found no central binding university-wide AI policy page. Verified central evidence covers GPT@RUB availability, privacy/data-handling notices, general ZfW guidance, and GPT@RUB usage directions. Verified unit-level evidence covers English Seminar and Geography Institute rules for student work; those claims are scoped to the issuing unit.

targets.sourceTitle: Richtlinien des Englischen Seminars zum Umgang mit Kunstlicher Intelligenz
Nutzung Kunstlicher Intelligenz am Geographischen Institut der Ruhr-Universitat Bochum

stopConditions: Stop after central GPT@RUB/ZfW sources and unit-level PDFs support narrow claim candidates.
Do not infer a central binding university-wide AI policy from faculty, institute, project, or news pages.
Preserve German evidence snippets for German sources and use English only as display helper text.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Richtlinien des Englischen Seminars zum Umgang mit Kunstlicher Intelligenz
Nutzung Kunstlicher Intelligenz am Geographischen Institut der Ruhr-Universitat Bochum

artifacts.claimText: RUB's IT.SERVICES page describes GPT@RUB as an AI chat portal that offers all RUB students, staff, and lecturers reliable access to AI in everyday university life.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: GPT@RUB offers all RUB students, staff and lecturers reliable access to artificial intelligence in everyday university life.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a central service/access claim only; it is not a claim that all AI use is approved in every context.

artifacts.claimText: The GPT@RUB privacy notice says RUB IDs are stored on the server and not transmitted to OpenAI, chat entries are forwarded to OpenAI without identifiers and IP addresses visible to OpenAI, and personal data from third parties should not be used in chat.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Your RUB ID and password are required for login. The RUB ID is also stored on the server and is not transmitted to OpenAI. There is no user account assigned to individual users at OpenAI.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a privacy-notice summary from the central service page; not a full independent privacy audit.

artifacts.claimText: RUB's GPT@RUB usage directions say third-party personal data and sensitive third-party personal data may not be used as GPT@RUB input, and GPT@RUB or other AI systems may not be used for automated decision-making in examinations.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Es durfen keine personenbezogenen Daten Dritter gem. Art. 4 Abs. 1 DSGVO als Input fur GPT@RUB verwendet werden. ... GPT@RUB und andere KI-Systeme durfen (z.B. im Kontext von Prufungen) nicht zur automatisierten Entscheidungsfindung gem. Art. 22 Abs. 2 DSGVO verwendet werden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: No third-party personal data may be used as GPT@RUB input; GPT@RUB and other AI systems may not be used for automated decision-making in examinations.

artifacts.notes: Approved because the German source uses mandatory language; claim remains limited to GPT@RUB usage directions and exam automated decision-making.

artifacts.claimText: RUB's ZfW FAQ says generative AI tools can be used at RUB in research, teaching, and study, but that use can be restricted or tied to disclosure requirements in certain contexts such as written examinations.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Ja: Generative KI-Tools konnen an der RUB in Forschung, Lehre und Studium genutzt werden. Diese Nutzung kann aber in bestimmten Kontexten (zum Beispiel bei schriftlichen Prufungen) eingeschrankt oder mit Kennzeichnungspflichten verbunden werden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Generative AI tools can be used at RUB in research, teaching, and study, but use can be restricted or tied to disclosure requirements in certain contexts.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: FAQ: Ist der Einsatz generativer KI an der RUB erlaubt?

artifacts.notes: Approved as FAQ/guidance language; not treated as a complete binding assessment policy.

artifacts.claimText: The English Seminar's AI guidelines require written coursework to use the seminar's declaration of authenticity, require GPT-created text passages to be marked, prohibit inserting whole GPT-created paragraphs, and state that unmarked use of GPT-generated text counts as an attempt to cheat.

citation.citationTitle: Richtlinien des Englischen Seminars zum Umgang mit Kunstlicher Intelligenz

artifacts.sourceTitle: Richtlinien des Englischen Seminars zum Umgang mit Kunstlicher Intelligenz
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Es ist nicht zulassig, ganze Absatze von GPTs erstellen zu lassen und in den eigenen Text einzufugen. ... die ungekennzeichnete Verwendung von Text, der von einem GPT generiert wurde, stets als Tauschungsversuch und wird entsprechend geahndet.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The English Seminar prohibits inserting whole GPT-created paragraphs and treats unmarked GPT-generated text as an attempt to cheat.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Regeln fur den Umgang mit GPTs am Englischen Seminar

citation.citationTitle: Richtlinien des Englischen Seminars zum Umgang mit Kunstlicher Intelligenz

artifacts.notes: Approved only as English Seminar guidance, not a university-wide rule.

artifacts.claimText: The Geography Institute's AI guidelines say students may use AI-supported tools for topic development and language improvement, but AI-generated subject content, figures, and tables must be marked; otherwise this is treated as an attempt to cheat.

citation.citationTitle: Nutzung Kunstlicher Intelligenz am Geographischen Institut der Ruhr-Universitat Bochum

artifacts.sourceTitle: Nutzung Kunstlicher Intelligenz am Geographischen Institut der Ruhr-Universitat Bochum
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: fachliche Inhalte und Darstellungen einschl. Abbildungen und Tabellen, die mit einem KI-Tool erstellt wurden, als solche kenntlich machen mussen, da ansonsten ein Tauschungsversuch vorliegt und Studien- und Prufungsleistungen nicht bestanden werden
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: AI-generated subject content, figures, and tables must be marked; otherwise this is treated as an attempt to cheat and the work is failed.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Leitlinien zur Nutzung von Kunstlicher Intelligenz am Geographischen Institut

citation.citationTitle: Nutzung Kunstlicher Intelligenz am Geographischen Institut der Ruhr-Universitat Bochum

artifacts.notes: Approved only as Geography Institute guidance for student work; not elevated to university-wide policy.

artifacts.title: Ruhr-Universitat Bochum staged AI policy crawl
artifacts.summary: The staged crawl found central official RUB guidance for GPT@RUB access, privacy, usage directions, and ZfW teaching/study FAQ guidance. It did not find a single central binding university-wide AI policy. Unit-level claims are limited to the English Seminar and Geography Institute guidance documents.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central binding university-wide AI policy was found in this crawl; department-level documents were not generalized beyond their issuing units.
The Philology guide PDF was rejected because the available extracted text was too garbled for reliable evidence snippets.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
